description: Real-time campus sensor overview with ML predictions

targets.query:
from(bucket: "campus_raw")
  |> range(start: -2m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor_energy")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> group(columns: ["room_id"])
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> sum()

from(bucket: "campus_1m")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor_1m_occupancy")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "avg")
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> mean()

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM anomalies WHERE detected_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'

panels.title: Buildings Reporting Yesterday
panels.description: Count of buildings that submitted energy data yesterday. Expect 25.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT building_id) AS "Buildings Reporting" FROM energy_daily WHERE date = CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day'

targets.query:
from(bucket: "campus_1m")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor_1m_temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "avg")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "room_id"])

from(bucket: "campus_1m")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor_1m_energy")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "avg")
  |> group(columns: ["building_id"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "building_id"])

targets.rawSql: SELECT detected_at, building_id, room_id, sensor_type, anomaly_type, severity, value, threshold, message FROM anomalies ORDER BY detected_at DESC LIMIT 50

targets.query:
from(bucket: "campus_1m")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor_1m_energy")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "avg")
  |> group(columns: ["building_id"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "building_id"])

panels.title: Daily Energy — Actual (yesterday, per building)
panels.description: Total kWh per building for yesterday from the Spark daily rollup (runs at 00:30).

targets.rawSql: SELECT building_id, total_kwh FROM energy_daily WHERE date = CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' ORDER BY total_kwh DESC

targets.query:
from(bucket: "campus_1m")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor_1m_temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "avg")
  |> group(columns: ["building_id"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "building_id"])

from(bucket: "campus_1m")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor_1m_occupancy")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "avg")
  |> group(columns: ["building_id"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "building_id"])

panels.title: Canteen Congestion — Actual vs Predicted (persons)
panels.description: Real-time XGBoost predictions from the Flink congestion job. Requires ≥24h of occupancy history per room. Shows 'No data' until the prediction lag warms up.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "campus_predictions")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "predicted_occupancy")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.room_type == "canteen")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "actual_avg")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "room_id"])

from(bucket: "campus_predictions")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "predicted_occupancy")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.room_type == "canteen")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "predicted_avg")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "room_id"])

panels.title: Library Congestion — Actual vs Predicted (persons)
panels.description: Real-time XGBoost predictions from the Flink congestion job. Requires ≥24h of occupancy history per room.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "campus_predictions")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "predicted_occupancy")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.room_type == "library")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "actual_avg")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "room_id"])

from(bucket: "campus_predictions")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "predicted_occupancy")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.room_type == "library")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "predicted_avg")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "room_id"])

panels.title: Energy Forecast vs Actual — Next-Day kWh (per building)
panels.description: Solid = actual from energy_daily. Dashed = ML next-day forecast from ml_energy_features (written by the Airflow ml_energy_batch_inference DAG at 01:30 daily).

targets.rawSql: SELECT date AS "time", building_id AS metric, total_kwh AS "Actual kWh" FROM energy_daily WHERE $__timeFilter(date) ORDER BY date
SELECT date AS "time", building_id AS metric, total_energy_kwh AS "ML Forecast kWh" FROM ml_energy_features WHERE $__timeFilter(date) ORDER BY date

panels.title: Prediction Pipeline Status
panels.description: Count of real-time congestion predictions written to campus_predictions in the last hour. Starts accumulating after ≥24h of occupancy warm-up.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "campus_predictions")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "predicted_occupancy")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "predicted_avg")
  |> group()
  |> count()

panels.title: ML Batch Inference — Last Run
panels.description: Most recent date for which a next-day energy forecast exists in ml_energy_features.

targets.rawSql: SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM MAX(written_at)) * 1000 AS value FROM ml_energy_features

title: Campus Overview
